allow: Bash(python -c "from recipes.compiler import load_schema, validate_recipe, compile_recipe, normalize_recipe; import json; schema = load_schema\(\); recipe = json.load\(open\(''recipes/examples/baseline-sft.recipe.json''\)\); recipe = normalize_recipe\(recipe\); errs = validate_recipe\(recipe, schema\); print\(''Schema validation errors:'', errs\); cfg = compile_recipe\(recipe\); print\(''Compiled:'', cfg.recipe_id, cfg.trainer_type, cfg.backend\)")
